expectations.text: Produces and returns a real DOCX output file rather than a plan or an explanation that an input file is missing.
expectations.evidence: PASS: zh-paper-final.docx is a 76,625-byte ZIP/OOXML package (SHA-256 A263A287563817F182FC4A49190A459561548E9C6395DEB5E9C648CC1550D63A); the package contains word/document.xml and two embedded OLE binaries. The source fixture remains at a distinct path.

expectations.text: Preserves the source and creates exactly two numbered display Equation.DSMT4 objects with native MathType numbers 1 and 2.
expectations.evidence: PASS: Independent OOXML inspection found exactly 2 o:OLEObject elements with ProgID Equation.DSMT4, 0 Word oMath nodes, two MTDisplayEquation paragraphs, two MTPlaceRef fields, and native displayed values 1 and 2. styles.xml defines MTDisplayEquation with a center tab at 4160 and a right tab at 8300.

expectations.text: Creates exactly two MathType-native dynamic references backed by live ZEqnNum bookmarks and GOTOBUTTON/REF fields.
expectations.evidence: PASS: word/document.xml contains exactly 2 GOTOBUTTON fields and 2 nested REF ZEqnNum fields linked to live bookmark pairs ZEqnNum678385 and ZEqnNum167174.

expectations.text: Keeps the equations in centered standalone paragraphs and preserves the Traditional Chinese lead-in and 其中， symbol-definition paragraphs.
expectations.evidence: PASS: OOXML preserves both Traditional Chinese lead-ins and two paragraphs beginning with 其中，. The 993x1404 rendered page visibly shows both equations centered on standalone lines with numbers at the right and the required prose before and after.

expectations.text: Runs manifest-aware validation and reports zero unresolved markers and zero structural errors.
expectations.evidence: PASS: validation.json has ok=true, errors=[], warnings=[], counts 2/0/2/2, numbers [1,2], and the package contains no {{...}} markers. A fresh validator run independently returned exit code 0 with the same result.

expectations.text: Produces and returns a real DOCX output file from the attached English fixture.

expectations.text: Creates exactly three Equation.DSMT4 objects: two numbered displays and one unnumbered inline equation.

expectations.text: Creates exactly two MathType-native dynamic references and sequential native numbers 1 and 2.
expectations.evidence: PASS: OOXML contains 2 MTPlaceRef fields, native values [1,2], exactly 2 GOTOBUTTON/REF field pairs, and live bookmarks ZEqnNum914825 and ZEqnNum521057.

expectations.text: Preserves English academic lead-ins and where paragraphs without leaving any variable used in the body undefined.

expectations.text: Runs manifest-aware validation and reports zero unresolved markers and zero structural errors.
expectations.evidence: PASS: validation.json reports ok=true with errors=[] and warnings=[]; document.xml has no unresolved {{...}} markers. A fresh validator run returned exit code 0 with counts 3/0/2/2.

expectations.text: Produces and returns a real PPTX output file rather than a plan.

expectations.text: Horizontally centers the equation and removes the complete marker text box.

expectations.text: Preserves the Traditional Chinese lead-in and 其中， symbol-definition text.

expectations.text: Produces and returns a real PPTX output file from the attached English fixture.

expectations.text: Creates one centered Equation.DSMT4 object whose embedded MathML matches the manifest.

expectations.text: Preserves the English lead-in and where symbol-definition paragraph.

expectations.text: Reports no unresolved markers and no validation errors.
